description: Recto: Official letter in Arabic script. Approximately 4 lines are preserved. Wide space between lines. Very faded, and it is difficult to read more than a few words. The phrase "yuḥīṭ ʿilmah" (end of l. 3) suggests a report rather than petition or decree. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
